backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a chat application backend with global message board, user profile management, friend requests, and private message threads, protected by role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the video call feature audit and fix, listing the affected files (ChatView, VideoCallModal, useVideoCall), associated components, and test ID REQ-15 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the build plan describing each component's and hook's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color tokens, applied via Tailwind base layer.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Friends Chat app with meta tags for SEO, Open Graph, and Twitter Card social sharing, plus favicon and apple-touch-icon references pointing to the generated app icon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that renders ChatView as the sole top-level page.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Main chat layout component managing authentication state, profile loading, friend selection, and video call lifecycle; opens VideoCallModal when callFriend is set and uses a setTimeout to ensure the modal mounts before startCall attaches the media stream.
frontend/src/components/DisplayNamePromp: Onboarding modal that prompts the user to enter a display name, auto-generates a username from it, calls useCreateUserProfile, and invokes onComplete on success.
frontend/src/components/FriendListItem.t: Friend list row component displaying avatar initials, online status indicator (based on isOnline flag or lastOnline within 5 minutes), and an optional video call button that stops click propagation.
frontend/src/components/FriendRequestIte: Renders a single incoming friend request with the sender's avatar and name, providing accept and decline buttons that trigger the respective mutations.
frontend/src/components/FriendsPanel.tsx: Displays a full friends panel with user search, pending friend requests (each fetching their own profile), and a friends list, supporting friend request sending and friend selection.
frontend/src/components/MessageFeed.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of chat messages with avatar initials, color-coded by sender name, distinguishing own vs. others' messages and auto-scrolling to the latest.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Provides a text input form for composing and submitting chat messages, using the postMessage mutation and supporting Enter-key submission.
Displays a private one-on-one chat thread with a friend, auto-starting the thread if absent, rendering sorted messages, and providing a message input with optional video call action.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time users to create their profile by entering a display name and username, with validation and error handling via the createUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/VideoCallModal.t: A full-screen video call modal component that displays the remote friend's avatar, local video feed, call status, and controls for mute, camera toggle, and ending the call. Supports Escape key to end the call and handles media errors with an alert notice.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for React, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a custom hook backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profile CRUD, public messages, friend requests, user search, and direct messaging threads.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoCall.ts: A React hook managing local video call state including media stream acquisition, mute/camera toggles, simulated call status transitions, and cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom property design tokens for both light and dark modes including a dedicated video call color theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with TanStack Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframe animations, and video-call semantic color variables, plus the tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 15) describing a friends-chat app with existing features (chat UI, friends panel, video calling) and a known production issue with the video call feature flagged as a fix request.
